pr.title: 11L XSA4 + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA + RoPE50K (mean val_bpb=1.1565, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer with XSA on final layers, SmearGate+BigramHash embeddings, INT6 quantization, SWA, RoPE50K, and 2.75x MLP tuning for the 16MB stack.
techniques: XSA on last 4 layers paired with SmearGate+BigramHash embeddings and OrthoInit
INT6 per-row quantization with fp16 tied embeddings and late-K fp16 layers
SWA/50 with Muon WD 0.04, RoPE base 50K, and 2.75x MLP sizing for the 11L stack
